title: LogisticSearch taxonomy language file schema v1
description: Canonical per-language taxonomy source. The file is a plain array of term records. Crawler, website, and PostgreSQL runtime importer all read from this canonical structure.

term_id.description: [SHARED] Stable unique term record ID. Used by crawler, website, and PostgreSQL as a reference key.

concept_id.description: [SHARED] Stable global concept ID that links equivalent meanings across languages.

hierarchy_id.description: [SHARED] LogisticSearch hierarchy ID. This replaces the older node_code name.

unspsc_code.description: [SHARED] Optional UNSPSC code where a direct mapping exists.

language.description: [SHARED] ISO-style language code for this term record.

term.description: [SHARED] Human-visible term and crawler/search matching phrase.

role.description: [SHARED] Term role inside the concept group.

synonyms.description: [SHARED] Array of term_id references. These are references, not embedded synonym strings.

is_searchable.description: [WEBSITE] Whether users can directly find this term through search.

is_compound.description: [CRAWLER] Whether the term contains multiple lexical units.

morphology.description: [CRAWLER] Morphological shape used by tokenizer and matcher.

priority.description: [CRAWLER] Lightweight priority hint. This is not the final ranking score.

industry_standards.description: [SHARED] Abbreviations and global industry jargon related to this term.
